testcase.name: test_filter_greater_than_100
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permissions_and_potential.py:216: in test_filter_greater_than_100 fid = saved_filter_factory("greater_than", 100) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_permissions_and_potential.py:200: in _create assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"create saved filter failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: create saved filter failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","conditions",0,"value"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":100,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_filter_less_than_100
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permissions_and_potential.py:233: in test_filter_less_than_100 fid = saved_filter_factory("less_than", 100) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_permissions_and_potential.py:200: in _create assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"create saved filter failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: create saved filter failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","conditions",0,"value"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":100,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
